data.title: Microservices
data.description: Netflix utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Deployed via AWS, with services like Eureka for service discovery.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Netflix employs a CDN to deliver content efficiently across the globe.
data.technical_spec: Open Connect, a custom CDN solution developed and optimized by Netflix.

data.title: Data-Driven Infrastructure
data.description: System architecture is heavily influenced by user data analytics for improved service.
data.technical_spec: Includes real-time data processing and Apache Kafka for streaming data pipelines.

data.title: Resilient and Redundant Systems
data.description: Infrastructure is built with redundancy to ensure high availability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Chaos Monkey and other tools for testing system resilience.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Primarily operates on a cloud infrastructure for scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Predominantly uses AWS for cloud services and deployment.
